CVE-2019-14249.title: dwarf_elf_load_headers.c in libdwarf before 2019-07-05 allows att ...
CVE-2019-14249.summary: dwarf_elf_load_headers.c in libdwarf before 2019-07-05 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (division by zero) via an ELF file with a zero-size section group (SHT_GROUP), as demonstrated by dwarfdump.

CVE-2020-27545.summary: libdwarf before 20201017 has a one-byte out-of-bounds read because of an invalid pointer dereference via an invalid line table in a crafted object.

CVE-2020-28163.title: libdwarf before 20201201 allows a dwarf_print_lines.c NULL pointe ...
CVE-2020-28163.summary: libdwarf before 20201201 allows a dwarf_print_lines.c NULL pointer dereference and application crash via a DWARF5 line-table header that has an invalid FORM for a pathname.

CVE-2022-39170.summary: libdwarf 0.4.1 has a double free in _dwarf_exec_frame_instr in dwarf_frame.c.

CVE-2024-2002.title: A double-free vulnerability was found in libdwarf. In a multiply- ...
CVE-2024-2002.summary: A double-free vulnerability was found in libdwarf. In a multiply-corrupted DWARF object, libdwarf may try to dealloc(free) an allocation twice, potentially causing unpredictable and various results.
